name: Partial Context Understanding
description: System captured part of the request but missed full intent
symptoms: Response addresses only part of message
testScenario: Send multi-part request, verify all parts addressed
mitigation: Improve turn intent patterns, add multi-intent detection

name: Hallucinated Action Execution
description: AI claims to have performed an action (sent message, booked, etc.) without invoking any tool
symptoms: Response says 'I sent' or 'I booked' but no tool call was made
traceSignals: toolsUsed=[] with action claim in response
testScenario: Request an action, verify tool was invoked before claiming completion
mitigation: Strengthen hallucination guard, block action verbs when no tool was called

name: Tool Intent Without Execution
description: System correctly identified a tool was needed but never invoked it
symptoms: AI responds with text instead of taking action
testScenario: Send action request, verify tool is actually called
mitigation: Check execution guardrails for over-blocking, review block_tool_execution triggers

name: Unnecessary Tool Invocation
description: System invoked a tool when no tool was needed (e.g., simple greeting triggers CRM lookup)
testScenario: Send greeting or simple question, verify no tool is called
mitigation: Tighten tool routing policy, ensure reply_only execution path skips tools

name: Overdue Followup Ignored
description: An overdue followup exists for the contact but the AI does not mention it
symptoms: Contact asks about pending task, AI does not reference it
testScenario: Create overdue followup, send message from that contact, verify mention
mitigation: Boost open loop signals in prompt compression priority

name: Contradiction Not Surfaced
description: System detected contradictions in context but AI response does not address them
testScenario: Create scenario with conflicting info, verify AI surfaces the conflict
mitigation: Add contradiction-aware prompt section, boost contradiction priority

name: Missing Clarification Request
description: System identified missing info but AI did not ask for clarification
symptoms: Wrong action taken on incomplete info
testScenario: Send ambiguous request missing key details, verify clarification is asked
mitigation: Strengthen clarify_before_execution path, reduce confidence threshold for proceeding

name: Excessive Response Length
description: AI produces overly long response for a simple query (greeting, yes/no question)
symptoms: Wall of text for simple question
testScenario: Send simple greeting, verify response is concise
mitigation: Enforce brevity=short for simple intents, add length cap in response guidance

name: Empty or Near-Empty Response
description: AI returns empty or nearly empty response
testScenario: Send normal message, verify non-empty response
mitigation: Add fallback response mechanism, alert on empty responses

name: Pending State Not Communicated
description: System is in a pending state (awaiting approval, meeting response) but AI does not mention it
symptoms: User unaware their request is pending
testScenario: Create pending approval, send message, verify pending state mentioned
mitigation: Add pending state mention to response strategy when state is awaiting_*

name: Mood Mismatch in Tone
description: User is stressed/frustrated but AI responds with casual or overly cheerful tone
testScenario: Send frustrated message, verify empathetic tone in response
mitigation: Strengthen mood-to-tone mapping in response mode resolver

name: Tool Execution Failure Silent
description: A tool was called but failed, and the AI does not communicate the failure
testScenario: Trigger tool failure scenario, verify failure communicated to user
mitigation: Add tool failure detection in post-response check, force error mention

name: Memory Write Skipped
description: System identified information worth remembering but did not write to memory
symptoms: Bot forgets information shared in conversation
testScenario: Share personal preference, verify it appears in memory on next interaction
mitigation: Audit memory commit pipeline, ensure write decisions are executed

name: Wrong Tool Selected
description: System selected a tool category that does not match the user's request
symptoms: Calendar lookup when user asked for restaurant
testScenario: Send domain-specific request, verify correct tool category selected
mitigation: Improve tool intent resolver patterns, add domain-to-tool mapping validation

name: Group Message Leak
description: Bot responds in a group chat when it should be silent (muted group, irrelevant mention)
testScenario: Send message in muted group, verify no response
mitigation: Review group classifier thresholds, tighten muted group filtering

name: Slow Response Time
description: AI processing takes too long, degrading user experience
testScenario: Monitor response times under load, flag traces > 30s
mitigation: Optimize prompt size, reduce context sections, cache frequent lookups

name: Correction Flow Failure
description: User corrects a previous instruction but AI does not update its understanding
testScenario: Send correction after action request, verify updated action taken
mitigation: Strengthen correction flow in action planner, ensure correction overrides previous plan

name: Owner Approval Bypass
description: System executes a sensitive action without getting owner approval when required
testScenario: Send action request from non-owner requiring approval, verify approval gate triggered
mitigation: Audit approval gate conditions, add logging for bypassed approvals

name: Reference Resolution Failure
description: User refers to a person/meeting/followup and system cannot resolve the reference
symptoms: AI asks 'who?' when context is clear
testScenario: Refer to recently discussed contact by partial name, verify resolution
mitigation: Expand reference resolver sources, add fuzzy matching for contact names

name: Recovery Failure After Error
description: After an error or failed tool call, system does not recover gracefully
testScenario: Simulate tool failure, verify graceful degradation and user notification
mitigation: Add recovery handler after tool failures, implement fallback response strategy
